studyName: Multicenter International Lymphangioleiomyomatosis Efficacy of Sirolimus Trial (The MILES Trial)

tables.description: initial_medical_history_form: This dataset has been checked for HIPAA sensitive information, consistency between the asserted data in the study description with the data available through dbGaP, distributable study document corresponding to the dataset, format for study loading, and items that may be ambiguous to dbGaP users. Code meanings and truncated variable descriptions are provided as submitted. For questions regarding the data, please contact the study investigators.

tables.description: conclusionofstudyparticipation: This dataset has been checked for HIPAA sensitive information, consistency between the asserted data in the study description with the data available through dbGaP, distributable study document corresponding to the dataset, format for study loading, and items that may be ambiguous to dbGaP users.
